heading: Historical collections
label: 21306 Historical collections
text: The Regents of the Smithsonian Institution may allow the corporation to deposit its collections, manuscripts, books, pamphlets, and other historical material in the Smithsonian Institution or the National Museum on conditions and under regulations the Regents prescribe.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2130636:20 (last sentence)., (last sentence), .Jan. 4, 1889, ch. 2025 Stat. 640The words “historical material” are substituted for “material for history” for clarity. The words “at their discretion” are omitted as unnecessary.
